text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, April 12. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Good weekend progress on home projects. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
